title: begonia multangula var. glabrata
intro: Begonia multangula var. glabrata, also known as Begonia glabrata, is a species of flowering plant in the family Begoniaceae. It is a type of begonia that is native to tropical regions and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Begonia glabrata include the ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat respiratory problems due to its expectorant properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Begonia glabrata are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
